examples: A 70-year-old Chinese woman has been called "Super Grannie" after it was reported that she is crazy about running and has completed over 100 marathons so far.
Whether making a film for Grannie, or putting on a play, Fox always got great ideas!
My grannie said it was just silly to climb up all the stairs, he would have no breath.
Cats do not like anybody, said my grannie, they are just selfish besoms.
